author: śrīla saccidānanda bhaktibinoda ṭhākura
verses:
āmi tomāra duḥkhera duḥkhī, sukhera sukhī,
tāi tomāre bali, bhāi re
nitāi⋅era hāṭe giye (ore o bhāi)
nāma enechi tomāra tare

gaura⋅candra⋅mārkā karā,
e hari-nāma rase bharā,
nāme nāmī paḍache dharā,
loo jadi vadana-bhare

pāpa⋅tāpa saba dūre jā’be,
sāramaya saṁsāra ha’be,
āra kona bhaya nāhi ra’be,
ḍubbe sukhera pāthāre

āmi kāṅgāla arthahīna,
nāma enechi kare’ ṛṇa,
dekhe’ āmāya ati dīna,
śraddhā-mūlye deo dhare’

mūlya la’ye tomāra ṭhā̐i,
mahā-janake diba, bhāi,
je kichu tāya lābha pāi,
rākhbo nijera bhāṇḍāre

nadīyā⋅godrume thāki’,
cā̐da⋅bāula* baliche ḍāki’,
‘nāma vinā āra sakala phā̐ki,
chāyā-bājī e saṁsāre’
en_translation:
I share in your sorrow and in your happiness, that is why I tell you, O brother: having gone to Nitāi’s market, I have brought the Holy Name for you.

This Harināma is marked with Gaura⋅candra and is full of rasa. By this Name, even the renowned are captured. If you take it wholeheartedly,

All your sins and miseries will go far away, your life will become full of essence, no more fear will remain, and you will drown in an ocean of happiness.

I am poor and without wealth; I have brought this Name by incurring a debt. Seeing me very lowly, please give the price of faith.

Taking the price from you, I will give it to the Mahājana, O brother. Whatever profit I get from it, I will keep in my own treasury.

Staying in Nadīyā-Godrūma, Cānda Bāula is calling out: “Without the Holy Name, everything else is a deception; this material world is just a play of shadows.”
